{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = spiritual sight
| introduced = Skysworn
}}

== Skysworn ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|[[Spiritual sight]] can be blinded by certain auras.<ref name="cradle-04-skysworn-c2">''Skysworn'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:Skysworn]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
